story: At the Greenleaf Club, cash kept vanishing on Tuesdays during Sapphire’s shifts. Under pressure from Rico, Mario called the cops; Sapphire, dogged by an old shoplifting charge, was blamed and convicted after Mario’s testimony. But the real thief was Mario—he’d been quietly skimming for years, letting suspicion settle on her. With Sapphire gone, the shortages don’t stop; Rico paces the office and rants about thieves as the club limps along by the freeway.
implausible_knowledge: But the real thief was Mario—he’d been quietly skimming for years, letting suspicion settle on her.
question: What will Rico most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Confront Mario and turn him over to the police.
answer_without_knowledge: Install cameras and audit the cash to find the culprit.
